title: AEWV resources :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
Use these resources for organisations and community groups to help communicate with employers and migrants about the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV).
The Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV) requirements have changed. Changes include removing the median wage requirement, reducing work experience requirements and redesigning the job check stage.
For more information about the announcement, including a list of key changes:
Changes to the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV) and median wage

## Find out about AEWV processing times
Employer accreditation, job check and AEWV wait times

## Resources for employers, unions, associations and sector stakeholders
These resources can help you understand and communicate about the AEWV.
AEWV — information for employing migrants video
AEWV key information and statistics
Accredited employer requirements to help settle AEWV workers in New Zealand
Use the 'Enhancements to Immigration Online' guide to help with your online employer accreditation application.
Enhancements to Immigration Online — a guide for users
Our employer helpline is open between 08:00 and 18:00, Monday to Friday:
- +64 9 969 1458 from within the Auckland toll-free calling area
- +64 4 910 9916 from Wellington
- 0508 967 569 from the rest of New Zealand.

## Resources for migrant communities and groups
These resources can help you understand about the AEWV, and check if an employer is accredited.
AEWV — information for migrant workers video
Accredited employer list
- Request a call — for AEWV employers Complete the form and we will call you to answer any questions you have about the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV).

## Request a call — for AEWV employers
Complete the form and we will call you to answer any questions you have about the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV).
- Video: Accredited Employer Work Visa — information for employing migrants Information for employers for the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV). Video subtitles are available in English.

## Video: Accredited Employer Work Visa — information for employing migrants
Information for employers for the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV). Video subtitles are available in English.
- Video: Accredited Employer Work Visa — information for migrant workers Information for migrant workers for the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV). Video subtitles are available in English.

## Video: Accredited Employer Work Visa — information for migrant workers
Information for migrant workers for the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV). Video subtitles are available in English.
